vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only requires editing the Chrony configuration file to remove non‑server directives and restarting the chronyd service. This change does not affect authentication, bootloader, or filesystem layout and poses minimal risk of locking out access.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Incorrect removal of needed time sources could disrupt time synchronization; Potential service interruption until chronyd is restarted
